summary: A 2022 CBP video about the Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act: a narrated voiceover reads the legal provisions while full-screen text cards appear over b-roll of ports, cargo ships, trucks at a border crossing, and the CBP.gov website. It consists of narration plus text slides with no music track.
notable_text: U.S. FEDERAL LAW PROHIBITS THE IMPORTATION OF MERCHANDISE... MANUFACTURED WHOLLY OR IN PART BY FORCED LABOR; 'REBUTTABLE PRESUMPTION'... CHINA'S XINJIANG UYGHUR AUTONOMOUS REGION; CBP.GOV/TRADE/FORCED-LABOR/UFLPA
